article.title_zh: 安全快訊：ClickFix 惡意軟體作者已繞過 Apple 的 Terminal 貼上警告
article.summary_zh: ClickFix 惡意軟體已開始繞過 Apple 新推出的 Terminal 貼上警告功能。

article.title: US gov't blocks China's largest LED chipmaker's $239 million bid to acquire Dutch lighting firm Lumileds — US blocks acquisition attempt of European firm
article.summary: Sanan Optoelectronics, China's largest LED chipmaker, has abandoned its $239 million bid to acquire Dutch lighting firm Lumileds after CFIUS blocked it.
article.title_zh: 美國政府阻止中國最大 LED 晶片製造商的 $2.39 億美元收購荷蘭照明公司 Lumileds 的出價 — 美國阻止歐洲公司收購企圖
article.summary_zh: 中國最大 LED 晶片製造商三安光電在 CFIUS 阻止後，放棄了以 $2.39 億美元收購荷蘭照明公司 Lumileds 的計畫。

article.title: Apex Gaming PCs recalls nearly 18,000 power supplies over missing safety labels — the fix is a warning sticker sent by mail, units are entirely safe
article.summary: The U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission issued a recall on April 16 for approximately 17,730 Manik and Apex-branded ATX power supplies.
article.title_zh: Apex Gaming PCs 召回近 18,000 個電源供應器，因缺少安全標籤 — 解決方案為郵寄的警告貼紙，設備完全安全
article.summary_zh: 美國消費者產品安全委員會在 4 月 16 日針對約 17,730 個 Manik 和 Apex 品牌的 ATX 電源供應器發布召回。

article.title: Tariff Angst Resurfaces Ahead of Earnings From Industrial Giants
article.summary: Makers of power equipment, heavy machinery and air conditioners have been among the big winners in the US stock market this year, but renewed tariff concerns put them at risk of stumbling as earnings season gets underway.
article.title_zh: 工業巨頭財報期前關稅擔憂再起
article.summary_zh: 電力設備、重型機械和空調製造商今年在美股中表現最佳，但重新出現的關稅擔憂使其在財報季來臨之際面臨下跌風險。

article.title: Fitbit Air reportedly launching May 16, could cost around $100 with several bands & colors
article.summary: Over the weekend, we first reported the name of Google’s Whoop competitor as “Fitbit Air,” and now more details are coming out, including potential pricing, release date, and colors. more…
article.title_zh: Fitbit Air 傳將於 5 月 16 日上市，售價約 $100
article.summary_zh: Google Fitbit Air 競品傳將於 5 月 16 日上市，售價約 $100，並提供多款錶帶和顏色選項。

article.title: US opens refund portal to start paying back Trump's illegal tariffs
article.summary: The US government today opened an online portal for submitting tariff refund requests, two months after the Supreme Court ruled that President Trump illegally imposed the International Emergency Economic Powers Act (IEEPA) tariffs. The refunds will be paid to importers and customs brokers, while consumers who paid higher prices because of the tariffs won't necessarily get anything back. US Customs and Border Protection (CBP) opened the Consolidated Administration and Processing of Entries (CAPE) portal for IEEPA refunds. "Importers and authorized customs brokers can now file their CAPE Declarations," said a CBP bulletin issued today . Over 330,000 importers paid a total of $166 billion in IEEPA duties as of March 4, a March 6 court filing by a CBP trade office official said. Despite moving
article.title_zh: 美國開設退款門戶網站開始返還 Trump 非法關稅
article.summary_zh: 美國政府今日開設線上門戶網站提交關稅退款申請，距最高法院裁定 Trump 違法徵收 IEEPA 關稅已兩個月。

article.title: Anthropic's Mythos AI model sparks fears of turbocharged hacking
article.summary: Anthropic’s new Mythos AI model is raising concern among governments and companies that it could outpace current cyber security defenses, turbocharge hacking, and expose weaknesses faster than they can be fixed. The San Francisco-based startup released a cyber-focused model this month, which has shown the ability to detect software flaws faster than humans but also demonstrated it can generate exploits needed to take advantage of them. In one alarming case, the Mythos model showed it could break out of a secure digital environment to contact an Anthropic worker and publicly reveal software glitches, overriding the intention of its human makers. Read full article Comments
article.title_zh: Anthropic的Mythos AI模型引發駭客加速擔憂
article.summary_zh: Anthropic新推出的Mythos AI模型引發政府和企業擔憂，它可能超越現有網絡安全防禦、加速駭客活動並比修復更快地暴露漏洞。

article.title: Beating the heat with on-prem/edge solutions: how precision liquid cooling enables AI to run anywhere
article.summary: The speakers will explain how this innovative solution enables high performance/low complexity AI infrastructure deployment.
article.title_zh: 利用內部部署/邊緣解決方案對抗熱量：精密液體冷卻如何在任何地方實現 AI 運行
article.summary_zh: 講者將說明這項創新解決方案如何實現高效能且低複雜度的 AI 基礎設施部署。

article.title: EDA AI Agents: Intelligent Automation in Semiconductor & PCB Design
article.summary: The next era of semiconductor and PCB design will be defined by two parallel imperatives: making core engines faster and making engineers more productive. On the engine side, the industry is embedding
article.title_zh: EDA AI 代理：半導體和 PCB 設計中的智慧自動化

article.title: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
article.summary: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 獲得 Amazon 50 億美元投資，承諾在雲端服務上花費 1000 億美元
article.summary_zh: Amazon 向 Anthropic 追加投資 50 億美元，Anthropic 同意在 AWS 上花費 1000 億美元作為回報。

article.title: Google Bets on New Chips to Boost AI Results, Challenging Nvidia
article.summary: In a matter of months, Google’s AI chips have become one of the hottest commodities in the tech sector. Leading artificial intelligence developers, including some of the firm’s biggest rivals, are stocking up on them. Now, the Alphabet Inc.-owned company aims to build on its momentum with the likely introduction of new chips dedicated to inference, or running AI models after they’ve been trained. With this push, Google is poised to further challenge market leader Nvidia Corp. in a fast-growing category for semiconductors that’s fueled by surging adoption of AI software. Bloomberg News AI Infrastructure Reporter Dina Bass joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss. She speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: Google 押注新晶片提升人工智能成果 挑戰 Nvidia
article.summary_zh: 在短短數月內，Google 的人工智能晶片已成為科技產業最熱門的商品，包括其主要競爭對手在內的領先人工智能開發商都在囤積它們。

article.title: Google to Release New AI Chips, Challenging Nvidia | Bloomberg Tech 4/20/2026
article.summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Google’s plans for new AI chips focused on inference. Plus, Blue Origin successfully launches and lands a reusable booster for its New Glenn rocket but fails to place its payload satellite in the correct orbit, sending shares of AST SpaceMobile sinking. And, Cerebras plans an IPO, months after withdrawing a previous attempt at a public listing. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: Google 發布新人工智能晶片 挑戰 Nvidia | Bloomberg Tech 4/20/2026
article.summary_zh: Bloomberg 的 Caroline Hyde 和 Ed Ludlow 討論 Google 推出專注於推論的新人工智能晶片計畫，以及 Blue Origin 成功發射並著陸可重複使用的 New Glenn 火箭助推器。

article.title: Your Questions About Anthropic’s Mythos AI Model, Answered
article.summary: Bloomberg reporters answered dozens of questions from readers about the new model in a Live Q&A conversation
article.title_zh: 您對 Anthropic 的 Mythos AI 模型的問題已解答
article.summary_zh: Bloomberg 記者在現場問答對話中回答了讀者對新模型提出的數十個問題。

article.title: Original Task Manager creator explains why it lies to you about CPU usage — former Microsoft engineer shows unique solution to a seemingly simple, but actually complicated, task
article.summary: Dave Plummer pops the hood on Task Manager and explains how it gets your PC's CPU usage (and why it feels off sometimes).
article.title_zh: 原始工作管理員建立者解釋為何它在 CPU 使用率上欺騙您 — 前 Microsoft 工程師展示看似簡單但實際複雜的問題解決方案
article.summary_zh: Dave Plummer 深入探討工作管理員，解釋它如何獲取您 PC 的 CPU 使用率（以及為何有時感覺不準確）。

article.title: Wireless Infrastructure Association CEO braces for the AI and 6G era
article.summary: Patrick Halley, the president and CEO of the Wireless Infrastructure Association, discusses the top trends in the industry and how AI and 6G are poised to come together.
article.title_zh: Wireless Infrastructure Association 執行長為 AI 和 6G 時代做好準備
article.summary_zh: Wireless Infrastructure Association 總裁兼執行長 Patrick Halley 探討了業界頂級趨勢以及 AI 和 6G 如何相互融合。

article.title: Google Eyes New Chips to Speed Up AI Results, Challenging Nvidia
article.summary: The company aims to build on its momentum after inking deals with Meta and Anthropic.
article.title_zh: Google看好新芯片加速AI結果，挑戰Nvidia
article.summary_zh: 該公司旨在建立在與Meta和Anthropic達成交易後的勢頭基礎上。
